FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.30sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7ffa91673560>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-05-12T21:34:32Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-12T21:32:41Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]

        )

2026/05/12 21:36:10.196233210 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196239589 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196291817 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196292938 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196312507 {
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196313639 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196334300 new <- list()
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196335041 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196348511 new$width <- width
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196349222 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196363673 new$height <- height
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196364424 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196378846 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196379587 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196393577 new$title <- title
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196394268 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196408079 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196408790 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196422550 new$version <- version
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196423382 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196439596 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196440337 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196454217 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196454908 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196469079 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196469800 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196483130 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196483831 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196497351 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196498062 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196512934 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196513655 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196540340 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196541302 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196556228 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196565327 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196566169 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196578917 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196579438 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196589113 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196589553 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196598767 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196599258 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196613399 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196616453 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196632707 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196633418 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196656613 "default"))
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196657524 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196671144 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196671595 }
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196680228 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196680708 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196691474 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196691975 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196700132 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196711228 }
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196727167 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196737257 }
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196739000 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196752389 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196753201 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196767452 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196768383 domain = NA)
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196783626 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196784337 }
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196796635 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196797296 old$family <- family
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196811627 }
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196812388 version <- old$version
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196820340 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196830826 "2.0")
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196831597 if (version %in% versions)
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196843965 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196844706 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196860490 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196861201 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196874831 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196875622 domain = NA)
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196890784 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196891486 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196909723 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196910504 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196930083 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196930834 invisible()
2026/05/12 21:36:10.196944604 }
